test.prompt: Run `pnpm test` and report the results. If any tests fail, analyze the failures and suggest fixes.

test:e2e.prompt: Run `pnpm build` then `pnpm test:e2e --project=chromium` and report the results. If any tests fail, analyze the failures and suggest fixes.

lint.prompt: Run `pnpm lint` and `pnpm format:check`. Report any issues found and fix them if possible.

ci.description: Full CI check (format, lint, build, test)
ci.prompt: Run the full CI pipeline locally: 1) `pnpm format:check` 2) `pnpm lint` 3) `pnpm build` 4) `pnpm test`. Report any failures and fix them.

deploy.description: Build and preview the site locally
deploy.prompt: Run `pnpm build` then `pnpm preview`. Tell the user the local URL where they can view the site.
